blur_empty: Nothing is blurred on this page yet.
setting_language_hint: Choose the language for this popup. Auto follows your browser.
setting_blur_radius_hint: Higher = harder to read. 10+ hides from OCR, 15+ hides from AI.
setting_reveal_mode_hint: How to briefly look at something without unblurring it.
setting_transition_hint: Fade blurs in and out instead of snapping.
setting_highlight_color_hint: Color of the highlight when you hover over an element in Picker mode.
setting_blur_mode_hint: Standard is a simple blur. Frosted scrambles text so AI and screenshot tools can't read it, but uses a little more power.
setting_thorough_hint: Also blur empty containers. Catches more, but may hide layouts.
setting_tab_privacy_hint: Replace the browser tab title and favicon with a generic placeholder. Great for screen sharing.
setting_auto_blur_tab_hint: Automatically blur the page when you switch to another tab.
setting_auto_blur_idle_hint: Automatically blur the page after a period of inactivity.
setting_idle_timeout_hint: Seconds of inactivity before auto-blur triggers.
setting_blur_timer_hint: Auto-clear blur after this many minutes. 0 = off.
setting_redaction_color_hint: Color used for redacted mode blocks. Black is the most secure.
detect_pii_hint: Automatically blur emails, phone numbers, SSNs, credit cards, and financial figures.
cat_text_hint: Headings, paragraphs, links, and inline text.
cat_structure_hint: Sections, articles, and wrappers that hold text.
shortcut_toggle_blur_all_hint: Blur every supported element on the current page.
shortcut_toggle_picker_hint: Open the picker to blur a single element or draw a zone.
shortcut_clear_all_hint: Remove every blur on the current page.
shortcut_screenshot_hint: Capture the visible page with all blurs applied and download as PNG.
shortcut_modal_prompt: Hold a modifier (Ctrl/Alt/Shift/Cmd), then press the key you want.
shortcut_modal_no_modifier: Hold a modifier first, then press the key.
shortcut_modal_ctrl_alt: Ctrl + Alt by itself clashes with European keyboards. Try adding Shift.
rule_overrides: These settings override the defaults for matching URLs.
rule_no_rules: No site rules yet. Rules let you change how blurring works on specific sites.
rule_hint: Change settings on specific sites. First matching rule wins.
toast_blur_all: Everything on this page is blurred
confirm_clear_all: This removes every blur on every site you've ever blurred. Continue?
tt_master_toggle: Turn Blurry Site on or off for every site
tt_clear_all: Clear the blur on this page
tt_picker: Click any item to blur it. Or switch to area mode and drag a box to blur a whole region
tt_debug: See what the extension is doing — helps fix problems
tt_clear_all_sites: Clear every blur on every site
tt_add_rule: Make different settings for a specific site
